payload.title: `cargo trustc adopt` — guided one-command dialect onboarding
payload.description: Turn dialect adoption from a manual multi-step (add metadata, install shims, convert calls, build) into one guided command: add `[package.metadata.trust] strict = true`, run the whole-workspace named-arg conversion, then `cargo trustc build` and report what's left (the lints that aren't auto-fixable). Pairs with the migration ticket. Makes 'try the real thing' a single invocation on an existing repo.
